name: progress
description: Self-paced progress: idempotent markLessonComplete, derived-count progress reads, and idempotent courseCompletion (badge) on the final lesson. userId from ctx never args (P0). Fills the courses barrel seams; no routes of its own.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-06, agent epsilon): v1 scope of STATUS row #3 (after #2 courses barrel review). Owns lessonCompletions + courseCompletions; READS the shared lessons/courses tables directly (progress derivation is the DATA-MODEL's own design) and never imports the courses feature. Instructor-facing completion aggregates ('agregat: instructor+') deferred — proposed for a later row.
